title: AoAPatches
description: A Minecraft Mod crafted for mainly DDSS 2 modpack to patch bugs and inconsistencies within AoA Mod
body:
## AoAPatches
A Minecraft Mod crafted for mainly DDSS 2 modpack to patch bugs and inconsistencies within AoA Mod.

Current patches:
1. Compatibility of Farming skill with right click crop harvest from Pam's HarvestCraft 2 and Quark
